programme.title: Depeche Mode - Rock Am Ring
programme.desc: Rock Am Ring and Rock Im Park are annual music festivals at the Nürburgring racetrack in western Germany; Depeche Mode performs at the event.

programme.title: The Jimi Hendrix Experience: Live at Monterey
programme.desc: The galvanizing, US-debut performance of "The Jimi Hendrix Experience" at the Monterey International Pop Festival propelled Hendrix and his bandmates, Mitch Mitchell and Noel Redding, to the top ranks of international rock royalty.

programme.title: Tom Petty & The Heartbreakers - Live at Soundstage

programme.title: Robert Plant - Live in London 2014
programme.desc: ITunes Festival is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London.

programme.title: Soundgarden - Live in London 2014

programme.title: Linkin Park - Live in New York

programme.title: Green Day: Live at Fox Theater
programme.desc: Green Day performs from "21st Century Breakdown", at the Fox Theater in the band's hometown, Oakland, California.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Lucky Luciano's crimes with the Mafia, including bribing high-ranking officials, got him 50 years in jail. However, when WWII broke out, the USA needed Luciano's help.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Lifting the lid on notorious mobsters. Joe Colombo loved fame and money and took on the FBI in the 70s, with his Italian-American Civil Rights League campaigning against harassment.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Ambitious John Gotti became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head and earned the nickname 'Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.sub-title: Tony Spilotro - The Las Vegas Enforcer
programme.desc: Enforcer Tony `The Ant' Spilotro left dozens of bodies in his wake as he protected the Chicago Outfit's interests in Vegas casinos. Soon he became a target of the FBI and the Mob.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Tales of real-life crime told by the FBI. Vito Genovese dealt with disloyalty ruthlessly and rose through the Mafia ranks, but he was to cause his own downfall with a massive error.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Carmine Galante took the Mob into the world of heroin and even when locked up in jail, Galente still managed to control the streets and profit from his drug empire.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Ex-FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as mobster `Donnie Brasco', reveals how his undercover work led to over 100 convictions.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: The death of Peppino Impastato in 1978 was dismissed by police as a random act. But he was an anti-Mafia activist. Were the people behind his death sheltered by the Mafia?

programme.title: Twilight of the Yakuza
programme.desc: The Yakuza are deeply rooted in Japanese society, but they are a dying breed. Known for crimes like extortion and murder, they also hold their own rigorous code of honour but a government crackdown is threatening their continued existence.

programme.title: When Fred Met Rose
programme.desc: Documentary series examining what led Fred and Rose West to become serial killers.

programme.title: Fred and Rose: The West Murders
programme.desc: Focuses on the notorious house which the couple shared in Gloucester. Fred and Rose murdered their first three victims - Anna McFall, Charmaine West and then Rena Costello - because they `got in the way'. But when they moved into 25 Cromwell Street, the couple began to kill for sexual thrills.

programme.title: Fred and Rose: The West Murders
programme.desc: Looks at how a dogged police officer, Hazel Savage, fought to have the Wests' patio excavated when she became suspicious about the whereabouts of their daughter. The film also includes insights from both Fred and Rose West's former solicitors.

programme.title: Trevor McDonald and the Killer Nurse
programme.desc: Trevor McDonald investigates the case of serial child killer Beverley Allitt and reflects on how it was reported at the time. A combination of archive from the time, interviews with victims and expert analysis will piece together this tragic and shocking story.

programme.title: Police: Suspect No. 1
programme.desc: In Norfolk, an otherwise unassuming summer evening is shaken by an armed robbery. A vehicle is stolen and innocent people are shot.

programme.title: Police: Suspect No. 1
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Burgess of Norwich CID has a problem as the number of home burglaries has rocketed. Looking at the evidence, officers suspect that one man is potentially responsible for a large part of the spike in residential crime.

programme.title: Police: Suspect No. 1
programme.desc: After a raid on a cannabis factory, nine people are arrested and it is up to the team to get to the bottom of which role each suspect played.

programme.title: Police: Suspect No. 1
programme.desc: The team in Norwich gather evidence about a single-punch attack that has left a man seriously injured, and there are no willing witnesses.

programme.title: Dying Out Loud
programme.desc: Female prisoners explain how they got to be facing life without parole, even though they're innocent.

programme.title: Escape From Death Row
programme.desc: How did six murderers hatch an elaborate plan to escape from the first death row prison, thought to be escape-proof?

programme.title: Aileen: Life and Death of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: This feature-length film examines Aileen's harrowing life, tracing her story from the freezing woods of Michigan to the steamy swamps of Florida, and features her closest friends, her lawyers and even her estranged birth mother. At the heart of the film are the astonishing, unique, troubled interviews Broomfield filmed with Wuornos in prison, including her last, defiant words before execution.

programme.title: Fred & Rose West: Love & Murder
programme.desc: Fred and Rose West raped, tortured and murdered at least a dozen young British girls between 1967 and 1987, including several of their own daughters. Learn how two of Britain's most notorious serial killers were able to get away with their crimes for so long, how they hid the victim's remains within the confines of their own home, and how they were eventually taken down.

programme.title: When Fred Met Rose
programme.desc: Documentary series examining what led Fred and Rose West to become serial killers.

programme.title: Fred and Rose: The West Murders
programme.desc: Focuses on the notorious house which the couple shared in Gloucester. Fred and Rose murdered their first three victims - Anna McFall, Charmaine West and then Rena Costello - because they `got in the way'. But when they moved into 25 Cromwell Street, the couple began to kill for sexual thrills.

programme.title: Fred and Rose: The West Murders
programme.desc: Looks at how a dogged police officer, Hazel Savage, fought to have the Wests' patio excavated when she became suspicious about the whereabouts of their daughter. The film also includes insights from both Fred and Rose West's former solicitors.

programme.title: Trevor McDonald and the Killer Nurse
programme.desc: Trevor McDonald investigates the case of serial child killer Beverley Allitt and reflects on how it was reported at the time. A combination of archive from the time, interviews with victims and expert analysis will piece together this tragic and shocking story.

programme.title: Trevor McDonald and the Killer Nurse
programme.desc: Trevor McDonald investigates the case of serial child killer Beverley Allitt and reflects on how it was reported at the time. A combination of archive from the time, interviews with victims and expert analysis will piece together this tragic and shocking story.

programme.title: Into The Wild: Horses & Dingos
programme.desc: Australia's wild horses adapt to threats, using inherited knowledge to survive harsh conditions.

programme.title: Into The Wild: Horses & Dingos
programme.desc: Dingoes rely on teamwork and social roles to raise pups and survive harsh Australian winters.

programme.title: Animal Armoury
programme.desc: The electric catfish and electric ray use shocks to attack their victims, while elephants and kangaroos fight with their feet.

programme.title: Animal Armoury
programme.desc: Colouring that matches or blends with their surroundings helps the Arctic fox, green tree frog and penguin hide from predators.

programme.title: Project Manta
programme.desc: Project Manta tracks Great Barrier Reef manta rays to study behavior, movement, and conservation.

programme.title: Blue Whisper
programme.desc: Accompanying a team of specialists to overwhelmingly beautiful coral reefs, ancient shipwrecks in the Mediterranean Sea and sunken submarines that are clouded in secrecy to explore the versatile forms of underwater communication.

programme.title: Predators of a Different Kind: In the World of the Unknown Sharks
programme.desc: With the aid of modern technology, revealing the unknown behaviour of some unusual species of shark: lemon sharks and their white-tip reef counterparts. The journey starts off in the turquoise-blue waters of the Grand Bahama Bank.

programme.title: Zoo Babies: Cute and Curious
programme.desc: Zookeepers safely microchip and treat newborns tapirs and porcupines highlighting captive care.

programme.title: Zoo Babies: Cute and Curious
programme.sub-title: The Birth of the Baby Giraffe Mugambi
programme.desc: Lion cubs debut outdoors in Hamburg. Giraffe Etosha safely delivers her fifth calf after long fall.

programme.title: Zoo Babies: Cute and Curious
programme.sub-title: Thick-skinned Offspring in the Elephant House
programme.desc: Elephant calves struggle early with movement. Bear cubs are far smaller, born at about 15 kg each.

programme.title: Wild Moments, Four Seasons: Autumn & Winter
programme.desc: Whirling dervishes and traditional farming link Turkey and the Danube through faith and nature.

programme.title: Wild Moments, Four Seasons: Spring & Summer
programme.desc: Spring traditions unite: German egg symbols and Japan's hanami honour nature's rebirth.

programme.title: Cuttlefish - The Brainy Bunch
programme.desc: Cuttlefish, with 3 hearts and 10 arms, reveal brain secrets through their eyes and pyrotechnics.

programme.title: Lionfish: The New Pirates of the Caribbean
programme.desc: Armed with 18 venomous spines, the lionfish hunts, invisible to its prey, in packs. Shedding light on the fascinating behaviour that let the lionfish conquer foreign waters, and by doing so threaten entire ecosystems.

programme.title: Megeti - Africa's Lost Wolf
programme.desc: The story of the Ethiopian she-wolf Megeti, who lost her pack and is suddenly completely on her own. Since it is essential for the survival of the young wolf to rejoin a pack, she wanders through the Ethiopian highlands in search of a new home.

programme.title: Search for the Ghost Bears
programme.desc: Looking glacier bears in the glacial regions of the Katmai National Park on the Douglas River.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators
programme.desc: The wolf is performing a spectacular come back in the mountains of Italy.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators
programme.desc: The introduction of seven Slovenian bears, two males and five females, into the woods of Adamello, in Trentino.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators
programme.desc: Two eagles struggle to survive and produce offspring to maintain their species.

programme.title: Conversations with Dolphins
programme.desc: An exploration of the link between humans and dolphins and why they are so interested in and curious about each other.

programme.title: Conversations with Dolphins
programme.desc: An exploration of dolphin research and how it has changed over the decades, including learning of the species' intelligence.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Thriller set at the Stanley Cup ice hockey finals. It's Game 7 and the winner will lift the trophy but with the Vice President attending, criminal Joshua Foss has his eyes on a bigger prize. Holding the VP hostage, his demands are backed up by the shooting of selected hostages and the threat of bombs planted around the stadium. However, rink security guard McCord, whose kids are in the crowd, refuses to be cowed.

programme.title: Blacklight

programme.title: Hope Springs

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
programme.desc: It's the 90s and, while the world has moved on, they haven't, with parents Mike and Carol and their brood now irritating anachronisms rather than the loved, slightly goofy family. As they've forgotten to pay their property taxes, next-door neighbour Mr Diymeyer can buy up their home and raze it to the ground as part of his property development schemes. Can the family raise $20,000 in just one week?

programme.title: Dumb & Dumber
programme.desc: A pair of idiotic friends set off on a madcap journey to return a briefcase to its owner. However, they are blissfully unaware that the case contains a large amount of ransom money for the owner's kidnapped husband. Their trip is soon fraught with disaster, especially when the kidnappers begin to pursue them across the country with the aim of grabbing the cash.

programme.desc: A rich property developer wants to take over an exclusive country club and so challenges its pompous president to a game of golf leading to utter mayhem, and a stream of surreal and crude visual gags.

programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing he's an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.desc: Small-town private investigator Honey O'Donahue probes a series of strange deaths that are tied to a mysterious church.

programme.title: Drift
programme.desc: Young Liberian refugee Jacqueline barely escapes her war-torn country to settle on a Greek island. Her daily struggle for survival keeps terrible memories at bay, and she becomes close to an American tour guide.

programme.desc: A bittersweet story about a 43-year-old woman on the verge of divorce who magically travels back in time to her senior high-school years. She is able to act with the benefit of hindsight, but despite her efforts, she falls for the same boy all over again.

programme.title: Cookster: The Darkest Days
programme.desc: A dyslexic teen misunderstood by his family and desperate for respect, becomes a drug dealer struggling with addiction and debt while a rival threatens to destroy his world, driving him apart from the woman he loves.

programme.desc: Once the highly regarded composer to the Viennese Court, Salieri is now an old man, unknown and confined to an asylum. After a suicide attempt he recounts his story to a young cleric, going back 30 years to his heyday at the court of Emperor Joseph II, where he first met the young Mozart. Despite Salieri's Machiavellian attempts to frustrate Mozart's progress, the great young composer attracts the favour of the Emperor.

programme.desc: The story of photographer Elizabeth `Lee' Miller, a fashion model who became an acclaimed war correspondent for Vogue magazine during World War II.

After a team of potential players has been recruited, former player Jimmy Dugan coaches the girls and prepares them for the World Series.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: Horizon: An American Saga: Chapter 1
programme.desc: In 1859 families discover the lure of the Old West as they settle in territories from Wyoming to Kansas. Meanwhile, a gruff cowboy soon finds himself on the run with a prostitute and a young boy after killing a fellow gunman.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Ogre Shrek and his new wife Fiona are surprised to discover a letter from her parents, inviting them over for dinner. Fiona is eager to show off her new husband, but her parents don't yet know she's an ogre. Taking Donkey along, they set off for Far Far Away to visit them, but the trip is hampered by the jealousy of a wicked fairy godmother and her hired assassin, Puss in Boots.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesn't last for long as word arrives that the ogre's froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.desc: Fastidious businessman Neal Page and slobbish shower-curtain salesman Del Griffith are the reluctant odd couple trying to get home from New York to Chicago to be with their families at Thanksgiving whose thwarted travel plans keep throwing them together in.

programme.desc: Based on events surrounding Elvis Presley's experience of the US Army draft, this film focuses on fictional pop star Conrad Birdie, who is called up for National Service, preventing him from starring in the movie that was to make his agent rich. The agent, who needs money to escape from his cantankerous mother, sets up a last performance for his protege. The farewell event attracts legions of adoring fans.

programme.desc: A teen perpetrates a series of elaborate deceptions to ensure that he and two friends spend a carefree day in Chicago.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: Clark Griswold sets out to give his family a traditional Christmas. While his in-laws, among them a cousin from hell, sample his hospitality, they find themselves battling against rabid squirrels, and an exploding sewer to achieve a family Christmas that they will never forget.

programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team investigate ghostly phenomena in the Solent's chilly waters. The 19th century Spitbank Fort has just one recorded death, but this lonesome spirit is violent and unpredictable.

programme.desc: Suzi Perry presents highlights of the Canadian Grand Prix. programme.desc: Angus wants a garden that reminds him of his favourite holiday destination, Cyprus. Currently, he hates his awkwardly shaped plot and absolutely loathes the domineering dark grey retaining wall, which he thinks makes the space look like a prison yard. Angus loves to barbecue and would like a generous, Cypriot-inspired space where he can entertain his friends. He is also keen to try and grow his own produce. Can Flo and Lee make his Mediterranean island dreams come true with a budget of £6,000?

Dedicated to her son Harry, who she sadly lost to brain cancer when he was just 11, the Drop In Centre provides support to families coping with a cancer diagnosis. At Georgie's home, inspired by where the Moseley family spent their final holiday together with Harry, the team transforms her grim backyard into an Ibizan-style hideaway full of happy reminders of Harry.

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: Rick Stein arrives in the southern town of Madurai in Tamil Nadu - the land of temples. Here he learns the art of temple cooking and perfects the knack of eating with his hands. For lovers of fish, the Keralan backwaters are the ultimate paradise.

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Dave and Si celebrate the British love-affair with pigs and pork, perhaps the animal which has given more to British food culture than any other. They prepare a traditional gala pie and a sumptuous rolled pork loin with apricots and ginger. They also explain the important role the family pig has played in our history and travel to Butts Farm in Gloucestershire.

programme.title: River Walks
programme.desc: Natural history presenter Miranda Krestovnikoff walks along the enchanting River Deben in Suffolk. From Sutton Hoo, famous for its archaeological treasures, to Ramsholt Quay on the coast, she walks past salt marshes, tidal lagoons and through wooded groves. Along the way she discovers the river's history and wildlife and meets the people whose lives are shaped by it.

programme.title: Lies, Deceit and Betrayal

programme.title: Deadly Waters With Captain Lee

programme.title: The Gentle Art of Swedish Death Cleaning

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: James explores the wilder shores of motoring to discover what happened to the cars of the future that we were promised. From improbable steam cars and ludicrous jet turbines he reveals how the petrol engine and the power it gave us came to dominate the 20th century. He'll take to the waves in an amphibious car, risk his life at the wheel of a notorious electric scooter and take a hair raising trip in the fastest driverless car on earth.

programme.title: Make It at Market
programme.desc: Cath from Cheshire and Morgan from Oxfordshire, both hoping to turn their talent into profitable businesses, step into the marquee. Cleaner Cath wants to swap the day job for a willow weaving business and is hoping Dom and his team can help.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A Cold War Soviet classic goes under the hammer. Built like a tank, the Mosckovitch gets few admirers for style, but finds a home with a fan of Eastern Bloc classics.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek collects a Mark 2 Jag and explains why they made such poor getaway cars for bank robbers. A customer considers a Morris Marina as a present for his wife.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: The story of the development of the Nazis' final solution, the extermination of the Jews, and how Auschwitz first became a centre for mass murder.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: In 1930 Germany was a liberal democracy, with elections, parliament and the rule of law. Just four years later, democracy is dead, Germany's leader is a dictator and its government is in the hands of murderers. This is the story of how this happened.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to the Spa Royal Hall in Bridlington to value more items brought along by members of the public. Among the objects intriguing the experts are artefacts of HMS Falcon excavated from the sea bed, and a set of rare buttons commemorating the Battle of Quebec in 1759. Also, there is a first-hand account of life as a Japanese prisoner of war.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to Oxburgh Hall in Norfolk. Despite the wet weather, there are plenty of exciting finds, including a 300-year-old treasure box stuffed with surprises, precious family objects honouring the men of the Pathfinder squadron in the Second World War, and a set of discarded posters which bring the house down with a staggering valuation.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to West Yorkshire to collect a rare 1926 Dodge bus. Derek gets his hands on a rare Vauxhall Victor VX 90 police car that is expected to sell for more than a few coppers.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to Bolton to pick up a classic Italian sports car - a Lancia Fulvia 1.3 Sport. This classic car was styled by the well known Milanese coach builder, Zagato. Zagato are famous for collaborating with high end car brands.

programme.title: Make It at Market
programme.desc: Glassblower Belinda from Northamptonshire and upcyclers Becky and Paul from Oxfordshire are hoping Dom and his team can help them turn their passions into profits. Belinda has only been glass-blowing for three years and has recently graduated from university. Becky and husband Paul met and married after their partners both passed away. Now they want to establish a business that will support the two of them so that Paul can give up his painting and decorating job, and they can work together.

programme.title: Make It at Market
programme.desc: Mike and Sarah are looking to change their lives in the marquee. Labourer Mike has a passion for turning wooden bowls, but is held back by his struggle for perfection. Mentor Alice hopes helping him see the beauty in the imperfections in his work will be the key to unlocking a profitable business. Sarah's life changed during the pandemic when she quit her job and took up pottery. One year on and she needs to start making money from her craft.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: The team have a record number of cars to auction, but Derek finds room for one more - a replica AC Cobra. A couple are reunited with their Volvo breakdown truck.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A classic car fan with a love of the Jaguar E-Type reluctantly sends his dream car to auction, hoping to buy a motorhome. Two Ford Escorts get Dave's pulse racing.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: This episode tells the story of the biggest single killing year in the history of the Final Solution and how Jews, who eventually died at Auschwitz, came from places as far away as the Channel Islands.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.sub-title: The First Six Months in Power
programme.desc: Within the first few months in power, Göring eradicated the Nazis' parliamentary opposition. These months also saw the rise of Henrich Himmler, the unassuming, uncharismatic head of an elite force of fanatical Nazis known as the SS.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team look back to choose their favourite moments of series 31 and update some of the star items valued. Includes the moment when a £1 bootsale buy went on to become the best investment in Roadshow history, with footage from the exciting auction.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Samares Manor in Jersey the experts scrutinise objects from Japan, South Africa, Egypt, America and France. One of the most valuable watches ever seen on the show is uncovered, and there is the bizarre find of Marilyn Monroe's lemon squeezer. In a first for the 32-year-old series, a forensic test is performed live to prove the worth of a gold bangle.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek rubs shoulders with pop music royalty when he picks up a classic Morgan sports car. A World War Two ambulance arrives at Thornton le Dale and a Ford Model T needs a new home.

programme.title: Sangdil Sanam
programme.desc: Kailash Nath is the Manager of a Bank and lives a comfortable lifestyle with his wife and son. He is friendly with the Bank Watchman, Shankar Dayal Khurana, so much so that he arranges the marriage of Kishan with Shankar's daughter, Sanam.

programme.title: Main Hi Raja Main Hi Mantri
programme.desc: A genial financier becomes a politician for his wife's sake, but his ambitions lead him astray and threaten to transform him into a ruthless leader. As he gains political influence and power, his humanity, fidelity and integrity are tested.

programme.title: Bandhan
programme.desc: Suraj and Pooja are married. One day Suraj meets Vaishali, a courtesan, and decides to make her his mistress. Watch the drama unfold as Pooja reacts.

programme.title: Mere Brother Ki Dulhan
programme.desc: A young man tries to arrange a marriage for his brother, but finds himself falling in love with the chosen fiancée.

programme.title: Dhoom
programme.desc: A gang of robbers on hi-tech motorbikes, led by the charismatic Kabir, is sweeping through Mumbai, outwitting the police at every turn. When officer Jai Dixit is assigned to catch the criminals, he reluctantly enlists the help of garage mechanic and bike enthusiast Ali. Though the pair do not see eye-to-eye at first, they soon become a formidable team, tracking their enemies from the streets of Mumbai to the beaches of Goa.

programme.title: Band Baaja Baaraat
programme.desc: Shruti and Bittoo, two graduates from Delhi, reluctantly enter the business world together by creating a wedding planning enterprise.

programme.title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
programme.desc: A man struggles to win over members of his girlfriend's family, who all want her to marry someone else.

programme.title: Laxmii
programme.desc: Asif lives with his wife Rashmi and his late brother's son Shaan. His belief in logic and science is shattered when supernatural forces take over his house. What starts as a comical journey soon unearths a dark secret.

programme.title: Apurva
programme.desc: Kidnapped by a notorious gang of Chambal dacoits while on her way to meet the man of her dreams, Apurva must overcome extraordinary dangers in order to make her escape and survive.

programme.title: Shabri
programme.desc: After her brother is killed, Shabri takes matters into her own hands and seeks revenge.

programme.title: Sanak
programme.desc: Sanak is an action-thriller film, a lone hero who fights overwhelming odds in a restricted environment to save his wife and other unfortunates helpless hostages from the perils of evil.

programme.title: Ishq
programme.desc: Four friends go against their parents' wishes and marry for love instead of money.

programme.title: Veer-Zaara
programme.desc: Squadron Leader Veer Pratap Singh, a pilot in the Indian air force, rescues the stranded Zaara, a woman from Pakistan, following a bus accident, and their lives are forever bound. With all the ingredients of a classic love story, the film is a tale of love, separation, courage and sacrifice that unfolds over 22 years.

programme.title: Tiger Zinda Hai
programme.desc: An East Indian agent joins forces with a Pakistani agent to battle a ruthless militant.

programme.title: Salaam Namaste
programme.desc: Following a group of East Indian immigrants as they cope with life and cultural differences in Melbourne, Australia.

programme.title: Sholay
programme.desc: The tale of one man's fight for justice. In an act of retribution, cold-blooded criminal Gabbar Singh massacres the family of a police officer, Thakur Baldev. Left crippled by his enemy, Thakur is hungry for revenge but, seeing no way of bringing Gabbar to book, he hires two petty crooks, Veeru and Jai.
